title: Thurse
content:
{{Top|fa|leg|italics=1}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Thurse'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]{{CSWECite|III|61|''Quasar Fire''-class cruiser-carrier}} |line= |model=[[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier/Legends|''Quasar Fire''-class cruiser-carrier]] |type=[[Cruiser/Legends|Cruiser]]-[[Carrier/Legends|carrier]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=340 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine=[[Engine/Legends|Equipped]] |hyperdrive=[[Hyperdrive/Legends|Equipped]] |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=*[[Laser/Legends|Laser]] [[Cannon/Legends|batteries]] *[[Ion cannon/Legends|Ion cannons]] |complement=*[[Green Squadron (Thurse)|Green Squadron]] *[[Red Squadron (Thurse)|Red Squadron]] *[[Blue Squadron (Thurse)|Blue Squadron]] *[[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers=At least 12 [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=Cruiser-carrier |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=*[[Battle of Ord Mantell (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Ord Mantell]] *[[Battle of Bilbringi (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Bilbringi]] |affiliation=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |navy=[[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] |fleet= |owners= |captains=[[Mak Jorlen]] |crewmembers=[[Kol Eyttyn]] {{C|[[Wing Commander/Legends|Wing Commander]]}} |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|''Thurse'', we have visual on the Yuuzhan Vong ship. Low-profile coral oval. Looks to be frigate class or there-abouts.|Wing Commander Kol Eyttyn|}} The '''''Thurse''''' was a [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier/Legends|''Quasar Fire''-class cruiser-carrier]] used in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mak Jorlen]], the ''Thurse'' was a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]]-[[Carrier/Legends|carrier]] that saw action at the [[Battle of Ord Mantell (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Ord Mantell]] that [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before later going up against a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Malik Carr's personal ship|frigate]] in the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]]. At Bilbringi, the ''Thurse'' and its complement of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] [[Battle of Bilbringi (Yuuzhan Vong War)|attempted]] to save the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] ''[[Queen of Empire]]'' from the forces of the [[Peace Brigade]] and the Yuuzhan Vong [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] in the area. The cruiser-carrier aided the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] in escaping from the frigate before succeeding in its mission to drive off the Yuuzhan Vong [[Warship/Legends|warship]]. ==Description== The ''Thurse'' was a [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier/Legends|''Quasar Fire''-class cruiser-carrier]] produced by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] and measuring 340 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length. Possessing [[Hangar/Legends|launch bays]] that could hold a large number of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], the ''Thurse'' acted as a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]]-[[Carrier/Legends|carrier]] and retained a complement consisting of [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing fighters]] from multiple [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]]—including [[Green Squadron (Thurse)|Green]], [[Red Squadron (Thurse)|Red]], and [[Blue Squadron (Thurse)|Blue Squadrons]]—and [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] starfighters. Equipped with [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight]] [[Engine/Legends|engines]] and a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], the cruiser-carrier was armed with [[Laser/Legends|laser]] [[Cannon/Legends|batteries]] and [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], and also had enough room to carry at least a dozen [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]]. ==History== ===Action at Ord Mantell and Bilbringi=== {{Quote|Red and Green Squadrons will lay back to deal with assaults directed at the ''Thurse''. Blue will form up behind me to take the fight to the command ship. All other squadrons will break on my command.|Kol Eyttyn, during the Battle of Bilbringi|}} The ''Thurse'' served in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]] as of the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in which the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] invaded [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mak Jorlen]], the ''Thurse'' served as a cruiser-carrier and took part in a New Republic surprise attack on Yuuzhan Vong forces at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] after the New Republic learned of an impending enemy assault there. Along with a significant force, the ''Quasar Fire''-class cruiser hid behind the world of [[Quatin]] in Ord Mantell's [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]] and [[Space warfare/Legends|engaged]] the newly arrived Yuuzhan Vong [[Starship/Legends|ships]] in the [[Battle of Ord Mantell (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Ord Mantell]] after they decanted in the [[Star system/Legends|star system]]. During the fighting, X-wings and TIEs launched from the ''Thurse'' attempted to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the massive Yuuzhan Vong [[Qworlth skaal]] creature that was attacking the [[Jubilee Wheel (space station)|''Jubilee Wheel'']] [[Space station/Legends|space station]], to no avail. However, the New Republic forces were successful in their endeavor, driving off the Yuuzhan Vong [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], but not before the ''Thurse'' took damage in the battle. [[File:Flurry.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The ''Thurse'' was a New Republic ''Quasar Fire''-class cruiser-carrier.]] While the ''Thurse'' was still not fully recovered from the Battle of Ord Mantell, the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] ''[[Queen of Empire]]''—serving as a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] for [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]] from Ord Mantell—issued a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress call]] after it was boarded by members of the Yuuzhan Vong-affiliated [[Peace Brigade]] group in the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]]. The ''Thurse'' responded to this call, as a Yuuzhan Vong [[Malik Carr's personal ship|frigate]] had also been spotted near the stricken vessel. Arriving in the system, the cruiser-carrier deployed Red and Green Squadrons to guard the ''Thurse'' while Blue Squadron, led by [[Wing Commander/Legends|Wing Commander]] [[Kol Eyttyn]], was dispatched to [[Battle of Bilbringi (Yuuzhan Vong War)|attack]] the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]]. Additionally, some of the cruiser-carrier's other starfighter squadrons were launched in the combat area. However, while Blue Squadron managed to fight its way through the frigate's [[Yorik-et|coralskipper]] complement, the frigate began to make small [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Precision hyperspace jump|jumps]] that sent it all over the combat zone, preventing Blue Squadron from effectively harassing the vessel. ===Covering Han Solo=== {{Quote|What are doing out there, Han?''"
"''Chasing down a shuttle that has something the New Republic needs. Mak, once I grab it, I might need support on the way back in.|Mak Jorlen and Han Solo|}} With the frigate still a threat, the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] jumped into the system, and Jorlen, aboard the ''Thurse'', warned the occupants to keep out of harm's way, convincing influential New Republic [[Politics/Legends|politician]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to momentarily stay out of the fight despite the presence of Organa Solo's [[Marriage/Legends|husband]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], aboard the ''Queen of Empire''. Moments later, the Peace Brigadiers issued an order to the ''Thurse'' to move away lest they begin to expel the passengers of the ''Queen of Empire'' from the [[Airlock/Legends|airlocks]], but Jorlen refused to comply, as the New Republic did not make deals with [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. Shortly after, at least a dozen elite New Republic [[Troop/Legends|troops]] were dispatched from the ''Thurse'' to board the ''Queen of Empire'' in an attempt to combat the Peace Brigade members while the cruiser-carrier was positioned near a [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] in the Bilbringi system as its complement of fighters engaged the coralskippers nearby. Just then, the ''Millennium Falcon'' began to chase a Peace Brigade [[Martial-class shuttle|''Martial''-class shuttle]] that had departed from the ''Queen of Empire'' and was racing for the Yuuzhan Vong frigate. Although Jorlen once again requested the occupants to stay away, Solo, who was at the helm after the ''Millennium Falcon'' had docked on the ''Queen of Empire'', informed Jorlen that he would need cover fire from the ''Thurse'' after he retrieved two important individuals—the [[Fosh/Legends|Fosh]] [[Vergere]] and the Yuuzhan Vong defector [[Elan]]—from the fleeing [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]]. Solo successfully docked with the shuttle after it was [[Dovin basal|mysteriously immobilized]] and completed his objective, and the ''Thurse'' covered the ''Millennium Falcon''{{'s}} retreat back toward the ''Queen of Empire''. The cruiser-carrier attacked the frigate with its batteries when the vessel attempted to pursue the ''Millennium Falcon'', though the escaping freighter soon turned and suddenly steered a course directly for the Yuuzhan Vong frigate, blocking some of the ''Thurse''{{'s}} angles on the enemy ship. With Jorlen demanding to know what Solo was doing, the ''Millennium Falcon'' changed course toward the ''Thurse'' instead of the frigate, leaving the field between the two [[Warship/Legends|warships]] empty. With clear firing lanes, the ''Thurse'' pounded the frigate with its ion cannons and batteries, and although the last remaining coralskippers attempted to make [[Ramming/Legends|suicide runs]] upon the cruiser-carrier, the fighters were quickly destroyed. The ''Thurse''{{'s}} assault forced the frigate to give up its pursuit of the ''Millennium Falcon'', and the damaged Yuuzhan Vong vessel fled to hyperspace, leaving the ''Thurse'' victorious. ==Commanders and crew== {{Quote|Unidentified Corellian freighter, this is Captain Jorlen of the New Republic cruiser-carrier ''Thurse''. You've jumped into a combat zone. I suggest you hold fast or return to wherever you came from.|Captain Mak Jorlen warns the ''Millennium Falcon'' away from the fighting at Bilbringi|}} The ''Thurse'' was commanded by Captain Mak Jorlen during its encounter with the Yuuzhan Vong frigate in the Bilbringi system. Jorlen personally knew Solo, who was a hero to many members of the New Republic, and believed that the New Republic had a fighting chance against the Yuuzhan Vong with Solo on their side. ==Behind the scenes== The ''Thurse'' first appeared in [[James Luceno]]'s ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'', released in [[2000]]. The cruiser-carrier was later mentioned in multiple entries in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' but did not receive an entry of its own. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|multiple}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Thurse |es=Thurse |hu=Thurse }} [[Category:Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carriers]] [[Category:Starships of the New Republic]]
